data.title: MicroStrategy Stock Caught In A Tug-Of-War: Will Q4 Earnings Tip The Scale?
data.description: MicroStrategy (MSTR) will report Q4 earnings after market hours.

data.title: Harley-Davidson Struggles With Sales Drop In Q4, But New Touring Models Boost Market Share
data.description: Harley-Davidson's Q4 2024 financial results: revenue of $430.89M, down 34.7% from last year, and EPS of $(0.93) missing analyst consensus of $(0.66). Stock price dropped 4.38%. Outlook for FY25: flat revenue, down 5%, and operating income margin of 7.0%-8.0%.

data.title: Amgen Impresses With Q4 Earnings Beat, Analysts See Growth Ahead
data.description: Amgen posted Q4 sales of $9.1 billion, up 11%, surpassing forecasts. EPS beat estimates, and analysts remain optimistic about growth prospects in 2025.

data.title: Looking Into CDW's Recent Short Interest
What To Expect When Eli Lilly Reports Q4 Earnings On Thursday?
data.description: Eli Lilly will announce Q4 2024 results, with analysts estimating $13.7 billion in sales and $4.94 EPS, alongside a revenue growth outlook for 2024.
